chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1506 of 2022 CP D 1507 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.6776/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 06.02.2025 Mr. Hyder Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Touqeer Ahmed, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that these petitions are covered by Division Bench judgment dated 21.11.2024 passed in CP 3523 of 2022, therefore, may be disposed of in the same terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
